table-550-550.caption: From which post is the tag "bayesian" excerpted from? Please give the body of the post.
data: We begin by defining prior distributions and likelihood functions before moving to posterior updates in simple models.
Exploring complex sampling techniques for high-dimensional spaces where standard methods fail.
MCMC algorithms allow us to approximate integrals over parameter space when analytical solutions are impossible.
